# Runtime APIs

Browser and platform APIs that commonly pair with JavaScript.

- [WHATWG Standards](https://whatwg.org/) - HTML and related living standards.
- [Fetch Standard](https://fetch.spec.whatwg.org/) - Request and response semantics.
- [MDN Web APIs](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API) - DOM, fetch, storage, and more.
